The sign warns drivers about the sharp turn.
I wash my hands.
She washes the car.

watch.def: To look at something for a period of time.
ex: I watch TV every evening.
They watch a movie on Sundays.

water.def: A clear liquid that we drink to live.
ex: I drink water every day.
The water is very cold.

way.def: a road or path to a place
ex: This is the way to the park.
I don't know the way home.

we.def: Used to talk about yourself and one or more other people.
ex: We are students.
We live in London.

wealth.def: A large amount of money or possessions
ex: His family has great wealth.
Health is more important than wealth.

wear.def: To have clothing or accessories on your body.
ex: I wear a jacket in winter.
She wears glasses for reading.

weather.def: The state of the air outside, such as rain, sun, or snow.
ex: The weather is very hot today.
I like this cold weather.
ex_distractors: Bugün hava durumu çok sıcak mıdır?
Biz bu soğuk hava durumunu seviyoruz.

website.def: A place on the internet with information.
ex: I visit this website every day.
The company has a new website.
ex_tr: Bu web sitesini her gün ziyaret ederim.
Şirketin yeni bir web sitesi var.
ex_distractors: Bu web sitesini her gün ziyaret ettim.
O web sitesini her gün ziyaret eder.
Bu web sitesini bazen ziyaret ederim.
Şirketin yeni bir web sitesi vardı.
Şirketler yeni bir web sitesine sahip.
Şirketin eski bir web sitesi var.

ex: I see my family every week.
There are seven days in a week.

weekend.def: The days at the end of the week, usually Saturday and Sunday.
ex: I visit my family on the weekend.
What do you do at the weekend?
ex_distractors: Hafta sonu ailem beni ziyaret eder.

weigh.def: To measure how heavy something is
ex: How much do you weigh?
She weighed the fruit before paying.

welcome.def: A friendly greeting to someone who arrives.
ex: Welcome to our home!
Welcome to the team!
She speaks English well.
He plays football well.

west.def: The direction where the sun sets.
ex: The sun sets in the west.
They travel to the west.

what.def: used to ask for information about something
ex: What is your name?
What is this?
When is the party?
When do you wake up?

where.def: used to ask about a place
ex: Where is the book?
Where do you live?

which.def: used to ask about a choice
ex: Which color do you like?
Which book is yours?

while.def: during the time that something is happening
ex: I listen to music while I study.
She sleeps while the baby cries.

white.def: The color of milk or snow.
ex: The cat is white.
I have a white shirt.
Who is that man?
Who is your teacher?

why.def: Used to ask for a reason.
ex: Why are you sad?
Why is the door open?

wife.def: The woman a person is married to.
ex: His wife is a teacher.
I love my wife very much.

will.def: Used to talk about the future.
ex: I will go to the park tomorrow.
She will call you later.

win.def: to be the best in a game or competition
ex: I want to win the game.
They win the race every year.

window.def: An opening in a wall to let in light and air.
ex: Please close the window.
The window is open.

winter.def: The coldest season of the year.
ex: I love winter.
It is cold in winter.
I go to school with my friend.
He drinks tea with sugar.
I cannot drink coffee without sugar.
She went to school without her bag.
That woman is a doctor.
The woman is reading a book.
The weather is wonderful today.
She has a wonderful family.

word.def: A small part of a language with a meaning.
ex: I don't know this word.
Please write one word.

work.def: To do a job to earn money.
ex: I work in an office.
They work every day.

worker.def: A person who works for money.
ex: The worker is in the factory.
He is a hard worker.

world.def: The earth and everything on it.
ex: The world is very big.
I want to travel the world.
This painting is worth a million dollars.
The film is definitely worth watching.

would.def: Used to talk about a possible situation or a habit in the past.
ex: I would go to the park every day.
She would help me if she could.
ex_distractors: I go to the park every day.
I went to the park yesterday.
I will go to the park tomorrow.

write.def: To make letters or words on paper with a pen or pencil.
ex: I write a letter to my friend.
She writes in her notebook every day.

writer.def: A person who writes books, stories, or articles.
ex: She is a famous writer.
My brother wants to be a writer.

writing.def: Words written on paper or a screen.
ex: The writing on the wall is small.
I like your writing.
This answer is wrong.
You are in the wrong room.

yard.def: An open area next to a house.
ex: The children are playing in the yard.
Our yard has many beautiful flowers.

yeah.def: A casual way to say yes.
ex: Yeah, I am a student.
Yeah, it is sunny today.
I am ten years old.
Happy New Year!
The sun is yellow.
I have a yellow car.

yes.def: A word used to agree or say that something is true.
ex: Yes, I am a student.
Yes, please.
I saw him yesterday.
It rained yesterday.

you.def: the person or people that the speaker is talking to
ex: You are a student.
Do you like coffee?
The young boy is playing.
She is very young.
Where is your book?
I like your car.
This book is yours.
Is this pen yours?

yourself.def: used to refer to the person you are talking to
ex: Please take care of yourself.
You can do it yourself.
The temperature is zero degrees.
I have zero dollars in my pocket.
